title: HECO Bridge, HTX - REKT
relevance_summary: Bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that initiates a bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

monitoring_rules: BLOCK BRIDGE_WITHDRAWAL if validator signature verification fails
summary: The attackers manipulated validator signatures to withdraw funds from the HECO Bridge, resulting in significant losses. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for failed validator signature verifications.
